Gattuso could well be fired after the negative run of results, though there is still Saturday’s game against Spal to come before the international break.

The Diavolo haven’t won in five games across all competitions, a run which saw them eliminated from the Europa League.

Francesco Guidolin and Roberto Donadoni haven’t been contacted, while Arsene Wenger isn’t thought to be the right fit.
